error.signature: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.LeaderNotAvailableException: Leader not available for partition my_topic-0
error.regex: (LeaderNotAvailableException|Leader not available|leader.*not available.*partition|NO_LEADER|leader election in progress)

verdict.summary: Partition leader not available. Typically occurs after broker restart, during leader election, or when a broker is permanently down.

dead_ends.action: Immediately reassign partitions to other brokers
dead_ends.why_fails: Leader election happens automatically within seconds. Manual reassignment during transient state causes unnecessary data movement.

dead_ends.action: Restart all brokers to force a clean leader election
dead_ends.why_fails: Rolling restart loses availability for all partitions, not just the affected ones. Single-broker recovery is sufficient.

workarounds.action: Wait for automatic leader election to complete (usually 5-30 seconds)
workarounds.how: kafka-metadata.sh --snapshot /var/kafka-logs/__cluster_metadata-0/00000000000000000000.log --cluster-id <id>  # KRaft; or check controller logs

workarounds.action: Verify the broker is running and has rejoined the cluster
workarounds.how: kafka-broker-api-versions.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092  # check all brokers respond
